items.maltese: Kuljum ħafna nies jaqbdu bit-tal-linja.
items.english: Every day many people take the bus.

items.maltese: Xi kultant immur bil-mixi.
items.english: Sometimes I go on foot.

items.maltese: Rari nuża t-taxi.
items.english: I rarely use a taxi.

items.maltese: Hu jmur ix-xogħol bil-karozza.
items.english: He goes to work by car.

items.maltese: Oħti tmur bir-rota.
items.english: My sister goes by bicycle.

items.maltese: Meta mmorru Għawdex, naqbdu l-vapur.
items.english: When we go to Gozo, we take the ferry.

items.maltese: Bl-ajruplan immorru minn pajjiż għal ieħor.
items.english: By airplane we go from one country to another.

items.maltese: Bil-mixi huwa tajjeb għal triq qasira.
items.english: Walking is good for a short route.

items.maltese: Bit-taxi tasal komdu.
items.english: By taxi you arrive comfortably.

items.maltese: Jekk inti Tas-Sliema, tista' tmur il-Belt bil-ferry.
items.english: If you are in Sliema, you can go to Valletta by ferry.

items.maltese: Il-ferry jitlaq ta' spiss matul il-jum.
items.english: The ferry leaves often during the day.

items.maltese: Eżempju ta' l-ewwel ferry huwa fis-06:45 mit-Tnejn sas-Sibt.
items.english: An example of the first ferry is at 06:45 from Monday to Saturday.

items.maltese: Il-vjaġġ bil-ferry huwa qasir.
items.english: The ferry trip is short.

items.maltese: Il-vjaġġ jieħu madwar kwart.
items.english: The trip takes about fifteen minutes.

items.maltese: Tista' wkoll taqbad bit-tal-linja minn Tas-Sliema.
items.english: You can also take the bus from Sliema.

items.maltese: Bħala eżempju, ir-rotta 15 għandha tluq fil-05:30, 06:00 u 06:30.
items.english: As an example, route 15 has departures at 05:30, 06:00 and 06:30.

items.maltese: Bit-tal-linja l-vjaġġ jista' jieħu bejn għoxrin u tletin minuta.
items.english: By bus the trip can take between twenty and thirty minutes.

items.maltese: Xi kultant jieħu aktar minħabba t-traffiku.
items.english: Sometimes it takes longer because of traffic.

items.maltese: Bil-karozza tmur madwar il-port.
items.english: By car you go around the harbour.

items.maltese: Bil-karozza l-problema tista' tkun il-parkeġġ.
items.english: By car the problem can be parking.

items.maltese: Bir-rota l-vjaġġ huwa itwal mill-ferry.
items.english: By bicycle the trip is longer than the ferry.

items.maltese: Imma bir-rota hija għażla sabiħa meta t-temp ikun tajjeb.
items.english: But by bicycle it is a nice choice when the weather is good.

items.maltese: Jien inħobb il-ferry għax nara l-baħar.
items.english: I like the ferry because I see the sea.

items.maltese: Mill-ferry tara veduta sabiħa tal-port.
items.english: From the ferry you see a beautiful view of the harbour.

items.maltese: It-taxi hija tajba meta għandi bagalja.
items.english: A taxi is good when I have luggage.

items.maltese: Meta għandi ftit ħin, nuża t-taxi.
items.english: When I have little time, I use the taxi.

items.maltese: Jekk it-triq hija qasira, nista' nimxi.
items.english: If the route is short, I can walk.

items.maltese: Għal din it-triq minn Tas-Sliema għall-Belt, il-ferry huwa l-aktar prattiku.
items.english: For this route from Sliema to Valletta, the ferry is the most practical.
